title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIIT Hyderabad

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIIT Hyderabad
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!
